setup.description: Bootstrap the project: discovery interview, write PRODUCT.md, offer DESIGN.md, configure preview mode. Run once per project before other UI work.

plan.description: Plan UX and UI before code. Discovery interview, visual direction, user-confirmed brief — no implementation.

build.description: Build a feature end-to-end: plan (if needed), visual gates, production code, in-browser iteration.

preview.description: Interactive browser variant mode. Select elements, generate HTML+CSS alternatives hot-swapped via HMR. Requires a dev server.

spec.description: Generate or refresh DESIGN.md from the codebase (colors, type, spacing, components). Stitch-compatible format.

check.description: Technical quality audit: accessibility, performance, responsive, anti-patterns. Scored report — fixes nothing.

review.description: Design review: hierarchy, IA, cognitive load, scoring, anti-pattern detection. Actionable feedback — fixes nothing.

finish.description: Final polish pass: alignment, spacing, consistency, interaction states. Last step before shipping.

layout.description: Fix spacing, rhythm, and visual hierarchy.

type.description: Improve typography: fonts, hierarchy, sizing, readability.

color.description: Add or refine color strategy, palette, and contrast.

motion.description: Add purposeful animation, transitions, and micro-interactions.

responsive.description: Adapt UI for mobile, tablet, and cross-device contexts.

copy.description: Improve UX writing: labels, errors, microcopy, instructions.

onboard.description: Design onboarding, first-run flows, and empty states.

ship.description: Make UI production-ready: edge cases, errors, i18n, overflow, real data.

speed.description: Fix UI performance: load time, rendering, bundle size, animations.

tokens.description: Extract reusable patterns and design tokens into the design system.

brand.description: Build a distinctive brand identity: aesthetic language, fonts, palette.

refresh.description: Improve existing UI without breaking functionality.

options.description: Generate 2–3 design variants within the same identity.

amplify.description: Increase visual impact: stronger hierarchy, bolder color, more presence.

calm.description: Reduce visual noise and intensity while keeping quality.

push.description: Maximum ambition: advanced motion, scroll effects, showpiece interactions.

delight.description: Add memorable moments: personality, charm, earned micro-interactions.

form.description: Form UX: layout, validation, labels, multi-step flows.

nav.description: Navigation patterns: menus, sidebars, tabs, breadcrumbs.

states.description: Map UI states: loading, empty, error, success — no impossible combinations.

tone.description: Humanize flat or sterile UI through motion, copy voice, and feel.

system.description: Design system architecture: tokens, components, theming, naming.
